title: Apotheosis
description:
Apotheosis has many features, including potion charms, mini-boss mobs with amazing loot, placeable and adjustable mob spawners, and a complete weapon and armor modification system. You may notice that every quest gives some experience, this is because you need a lot of XP to use Apotheosis to its full potential!

Without any menus open, press CTRL + T to get started.
